nodes.label: Priority 1A — FedAvg with NBEATSxAux (backbone + aux_head federated jointly).
Seeded NBEATSxAux init. Mirrors fl.base.init_backbone but with aux head.
Run ``n_epochs`` local SGD on this client with the combined loss.      L = MAE
Phase A — federated training of NBEATSxAux with FedAvg.      Returns a dict wi
Phase B helper — collect (h_g, y_hat_z, y_true_z, key) on each apt's     train
